summary: Iteration 104 - Tested 4 features: Dashboard branch filtering (supplier_dues, fines, today-vs-yesterday), Daily Summary Date Range mode with Summary/Day-by-Day views, Quick Access buttons in sidebar, and Module Tours for 6 new pages. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard branch filtering - VERIFIED: /api/dashboard/stats with branch_ids param correctly filters supplier_dues and due_fines. Line ~93 (supplier_dues) and Line ~153 (fines) in dashboard.py apply branch filter.
Today vs Yesterday - VERIFIED: /api/dashboard/today-vs-yesterday accepts branch_ids param (Line ~225 in dashboard.py). Frontend passes branch filter at DashboardPage.jsx line ~226.

Daily Summary Range - VERIFIED: NEW endpoint /api/dashboard/daily-summary-range (Line ~626 in dashboard.py) accepts start_date, end_date, branch_id params and returns totals with sales_cash, sales_bank, exp_cash, exp_bank, sp_cash, sp_bank breakdowns plus daily array with day-by-day data.

Daily Summary UI - VERIFIED: DailySummaryPage.jsx has mode toggle (Single Day / Date Range), Date Range mode shows 4 summary cards (Total Sales, Expenses, Supplier Payments, Net Profit) with cash/bank breakdowns, Summary view shows Expenses by Category and Cash & Bank Summary tables, Day by Day view shows table with date, sales, cash, bank, expenses, sp, net columns.

Quick Access buttons - VERIFIED: 6 buttons in sidebar (Cashier, Waiter, Kitchen, Orders, Tables, Customers) with correct paths (/cashier, /waiter, /kds, /order-status, /table-management, /customer-portal) that open in new tabs via window.open().

Module Tours - VERIFIED: Tours configured and appearing on first visit for /daily-summary, /expenses, /customers, /invoices, /report-builder, /audit-trail. Each tour shows step-by-step modal with title, description, Skip/Next buttons, and progress indicator. Tours saved to localStorage as ssc_{key}_completed.
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing data for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 104 verified 4 features: 1) Dashboard /api/dashboard/stats branch_ids filter now applies to supplier_dues and fines, /api/dashboard/today-vs-yesterday now accepts branch_ids param, frontend passes branch filter q to today-vs-yesterday API call. 2) NEW /api/dashboard/daily-summary-range endpoint for date range summaries with totals (including cash/bank breakdown for sales, expenses, supplier payments) and daily array with day-by-day data. 3) Daily Summary frontend has Single Day / Date Range mode toggle, Range mode has Summary view (totals + Expenses by Category + Cash & Bank Summary tables) and Day by Day view (table with date, sales, cash, bank, expenses columns). 4) Guided tours added for 6 modules: /daily-summary, /expenses, /customers, /invoices, /report-builder, /audit-trail - tours appear as modal overlays on first page visit (stored in localStorage as ssc_{key}_completed). Quick Access buttons in sidebar have correct paths: /cashier, /waiter, /kds, /order-status, /table-management, /customer-portal.

dashboard_branch_filtering.frontend_integration: DashboardPage.jsx line ~226 passes branchFilter to today-vs-yesterday API

range_mode_elements.day_by_day_view: Table with Date, Sales, Cash, Bank, Expenses, Cash, Bank, SP, Net columns

quick_access_buttons.behavior: Opens in new tab via window.open()
